basic_details.job_title: NHDC Senior Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Handloom Development Corporation (NHDC) Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Notification 2026 has been released on 11 July 2026 on the official website nhdc.org.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for internal candidates with 3 years service; as per Govt. directives for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in English with Hindi as a subject at Graduation level, Post Graduate in Hindi with English as a subject at Graduation level, Diploma in translation (Desirable), Working knowledge of computer like MS Office (Desirable)
qualification.details: Post Graduation in English with Hindi as a subject at Graduation level OR Post Graduate in Hindi with English as a subject at Graduation level. Desirable: Diploma in translation i.e. Hindi to English and vice versa. Desirable: Working knowledge of computer like MS Office, usage of internet etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_handloom_development_corporatio: Post Graduation in English with Hindi as a subject at Graduation level, Post Graduate in Hindi with English as a subject at Graduation level, Diploma in translation (Desirable), Working knowledge of computer like MS Office (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NHDC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHDC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NHDC Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) recruitment is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NHDC?
faq.answer: NHDC has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Officer (Rajbhasha).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduation in English with Hindi as a subject at Graduation level, or Post Graduate in Hindi with English as a subject at Graduation level. A Diploma in translation and working knowledge of computers are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Officer (Rajbhasha) position ranges from Rs. 27,000 to Rs. 95,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official NHDC website or the direct application link provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test and a Group Discussion.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NHDC located?
faq.answer: The NHDC is located in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 201306.
